infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: REDLINE uses your location to track your route, speed, and nearby camera alerts while you drive.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: REDLINE records your drives in the background so your stats and Drive DNA rating stay accurate even when the app is closed.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: REDLINE uses motion data to detect launches and measure 0-60, braking, and cornering G.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: REDLINE needs camera access for live video Gap-Battles.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: REDLINE needs microphone access for live video Gap-Battles.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: REDLINE records your drives in the background so your stats stay accurate.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: REDLINE uses your location to track your route, speed, and nearby camera alerts.
